channel.title: Julian Barone on Julian Barone — Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Julian Barone on Julian Barone — Portfolio

item.title: Portfolio Launch Notes
item.description: A short retrospective on rebuilding my site with Hugo, Tailwind, and a few personal conventions.

item.title: Designing a Home-Lab Observability Stack
item.description: Grafana, ClickHouse, and a tiny Go agent keep my side projects honest.

item.title: Shipping Small Tools for Friends
item.description: Freelance lessons from designing micro-products in a few focused weekends.

item.title: About
item.description: Full-stack engineer experimenting with Go, Rust, and fast front-ends.

item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Feel free to preview or download my current résumé below. Upload the latest PDF to static/cv.pdf (or update params.cv.file) and this page will update automatically.
